# operations

**Instance Property**

An array of operations to perform on a column.

## Declaration

```swift
var operations: [MLDataTable.Aggregator.Operations]
```

## Configuring an aggregator

- **columnName**: The name of the column on which the aggregator performs operations on.
- **MLDataTable.Aggregator.Operations**: The operations that an aggregator can perform on a column in a data table.

items.description: The name of the column on which the aggregator performs operations on.
